TweakDesc_UpdateProtocols: Khubaza iiprothokholi ze-TLS 1.0 kunye ne-TLS 1.1 eyehliweyo

TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Ukhuseleko lweWindows lubonisa isilumkiso ukuba awungenanga ngeakhawunti yeMicrosoft. Ukukhubaza kufihla esi saziso siqhubekayo.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: Ichaza uluhlu lwexesha xa iWindows ingaziqaleli ngokutsha iPC yakho ukugqiba ukufakela uhlaziyo.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: Irekhoda umsebenzi wakho kuzo zonke izixhobo xa usayinwe kwiakhawunti yeMicrosoft kwaye unokuyingqamanisa efini. Ukukhubaza kugcina umsebenzi kwindawo.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Ilawula indlela uLawulo lweAkhawunti yoMsebenzisi oluziphatha ngayo xa usetyenziso lucela amalungelo aphezulu. Ukwaziswa okuhlala kukho kwemvume, Ungaze uvale i-UAC yokwaziswa. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: Yongeza imithetho ye-firewall ukuvala usetyenziso lwe-Adobe ekufikeleleni kwi-intanethi. Oku kuchaphazela ukuqinisekiswa kwelayisensi, ungqamaniso lwamafu, kunye neempawu zeLifu lokuCreative. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: Yenza i-shortcut ye-desktop ephinda iqalise i-PC kwi-Advanced Startup Options (i-Windows Recovery Environment) imenyu.
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Ii-Windows zabela i-ID yentengiso eyodwa kwiakhawunti yakho enokuthi i-apps isebenzise ukubonisa iintengiso ezijoliswe kuzo. Ukukhubaza kumisa oku kulandelwa.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Ukushukumisa ibha yewonga yefestile kunciphisa zonke ezinye iifestile ezivulekileyo. Khubaza ukuba ufumana oku kubangele ngengozi ngexesha lokusetyenziswa okuqhelekileyo.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Icwangcisa imo yombala emiselweyo esetyenziswa zizicelo xa zihlonipha ucwangciso lwesixokelelwano: Mnyama okanye Ukukhanya.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: Ivumela iiWindows ukuba zikhumbule kwaye zitshintshele kulwimi olwahlukileyo lwegalelo okanye ubeko lwebhodi yezitshixo ngefestile nganye.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: IiWindows zinokufaka ngokuthe cwaka usetyenziso olucetyisiweyo ngasemva ngaphandle kokukubuza. Ukukhubaza kumisa le ndlela yokuziphatha. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: I-SmartScreen ijonga iifayile ezikhutshelweyo kunye nee -apps ngokuchasene nesiseko sedatha yelifu kwaye iyakulumkisa ngaphambi kokuqhuba okungaziwayo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Xa iWindows ingqubana (isikrini esiluhlaza), inokuqalisa kwakhona ngokuzenzekelayo. Ukukhubaza kugcina impazamo kwisikrini ukuze ufunde ikhowudi yokuyeka.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: Ilawula ukuba i-Windows ivula ngokuzenzekelayo ukwaziswa okanye iqalise usetyenziso xa ufaka i-USB drive okanye enye imidiya esuswayo.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Ibonisa ikhowudi yempazamo ethile kwisikrini esiluhlaza sokufa endaweni ye-emoji yobuso obulusizi.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps zivumelekile na ukuba zisebenze kwaye zihlaziye ngasemva xa zingajoliswanga. Ukukhubaza kugcina i-CPU kunye nememori. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Ibhokisi yokukhangela ye-Start Menu ingabonisa iziphumo zewebhu ze-Bing ecaleni kweziphumo zasekuhlaleni. Ukukhubaza kugcina uphendlo lwe-Start Menu lwasekhaya kuphela.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: Ilawula ukuba iWindows ingena ngokuzenzekelayo kwimowudi yokubuyisela emva kokungaphumeleli kwemizamo yokuqalisa. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Ikhubaza ukongezwa kwesikhangeli seBrave: imivuzo, isipaji se-crypto, i-VPN, kunye nencoko ye-AI. Ichaphazela kuphela ezi mpawu zikhethekileyo zeBrave, hayi ukukhangela kwakho. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Ibonisa inombolo yokwakha yeWindows kunye noshicilelo njenge-watermark kwikona esezantsi ngasekunene kwidesktop yakho.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Yongeza i Faka ukhetho kwimenyu yokucofa-ekunene yeefayile zogcino lwecab.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Ikhowudi ekhuselweyo ye-Hypervisor iqhuba ikhowudi ye-kernel ye-Windows kwindawo ebonakalayo ukukhusela i-malware yezinga le-kernel kunye ne-rootkits. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_Camera: I-Master toggle ilawula ukuba usetyenziso lunokucela ukufikelela kwikhamera yakho. Ukukhubaza kuthintela zonke ii-apps ekusebenziseni ikhamera. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: Ilawula ukuba iqhosha le-Caps Lock livuliwe. Ukukhubaza kwakhona iqhosha le-Caps Lock ukuze ukulicinezela akwenzi nto.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: Ilawula ukuba ngaba abasebenzisi banokusitshintsha isikimu sesandi seWindows. Ukukhubaza oku kutshixa inkqubo yangoku kwaye kuthintele utshintsho.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Ibonisa iibhokisi zokukhangela ezincinci ecaleni kweefayile kunye neefolda kwi-Explorer ukwenza kube lula ukukhetha izinto ezininzi ngaphandle kokubamba iCtrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: IWinGet ngumphathi wepakethe eyakhelwe-ngaphakathi yeWindows esetyenziselwa ukufaka kunye nokuhlaziya usetyenziso olusuka kumgca womyalelo. Oku kuqinisekisa ukuba ifakiwe kwaye isexesheni.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Icoca ngokuzenzekelayo uluhlu lweefayile zamva nje ngalo lonke ixesha uphuma. Ukuphucula ubumfihlo koomatshini ekwabelwana ngabo okanye abasebenzisi abaninzi.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Igcina imbali yezinto ezikhutshelweyo ukuze uncamathisele kwiiklip zangaphambili usebenzisa uWin+V. Yenza ukuba uvule olu phawu.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Ibonisa okanye ifihla iSiqulathi seefayili esiCinisiweyo (ezitshiphuweyo) ngokucofa ekunene imenu entsha engaphantsi kwiFayile Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: Ivumela le PC ukuba yabelane ngoqhagamshelwano lwayo lwe-intanethi nezinye izixhobo, isebenza njenge-software hotspot. Ukuvumela kubonisa olu khetho kwiisetingi zenethiwekhi. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: Icwangcisa isimbo somboniso esingagqibekanga sePaneli yoLawulo ukuya kwii-Icons ezinkulu, ii-Icons eziNcinci, okanye ukuhlelwa koluhlu olungagqibekanga.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Isusa uCopilot, uKhumbula, kunye nazo zonke izinto ezinxulumene neWindows AI. Ukufakela kwakhona kufuna i-winget okanye ufikelelo lwe-Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: Ithintela uCortana ekuqaliseni ngokuzenzekelayo ekuqaleni. ICortana isenokuvulwa ngesandla ukuba iyafuneka.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: Yenza indawo yoBuyiselo lweNkqubo yeWindows ukuze ukwazi ukubuyisela umva utshintsho lwenkqubo ukuba kukho into engahambi kakuhle. Iyacetyiswa phambi kokuba uqhube naziphi na ii-tweaks.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Ikuvumela ukuba uqalise imisebenzi kwezinye izixhobo zeWindows kule PC usebenzisa i-pop-up yesaziso. Khubaza ukuba awusebenzisi olu phawu lwesixhobo esinqamlezileyo.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: Icwangcisa iprofayile yenethiwekhi yoqhagamshelwano lwakho olusebenzayo ngoku. Yabucala yenza ukufunyanwa kwenethiwekhi kunye nokwabelana, Uluntu luyayinqanda. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: Iseta uThintelo lokuSebenza kweDatha kwimowudi yokuPhuma, ivumela ukhuseleko lwe-DEP kuzo zonke iinkqubo ngaphandle kwezo ungazibandakanyi ngokucacileyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Ifihla ukhangelo lwe-DNS ngokuthumela ngaphezulu kwe-HTTPS endaweni ye-UDP ecacileyo. Ikhusela i-ISP yakho okanye inethiwekhi ekubekweni iliso okanye ukuphazamisa i-DNS traffic. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: Iseta ukuba yeyiphi inkqubo yeterminal evulayo xa uzisa iCommand Prompt okanye iPowerShell ngaphakathi kweWindows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: Ivula iithebhu zesikhangeli se-Edge kumatshini wenyani ozimeleyo ukukhusela iiwebhusayithi ezinobungozi ekufikeleleni kwisistim okanye iifayile zayo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Yenza ukhuseleko olusekwe kwilifu lweMicrosoft Defender kukhangelo lwexesha lokwenyani kusetyenziswa isiseko sedatha yeMicrosoft yezoyikiso zobukrelekrele. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: Isebenzisa i-injini ye-antivirus ye-Microsoft ngaphakathi kwenkqubo yebhokisi yesanti ekwanti ukuze ukhuseleke ngakumbi. Yongeza umgangatho omncinci wokusebenza. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Ibonisa okanye ifihla i-icon yoKhuseleko lweWindows (Defender) kwitreyi yesixokelelwano. Ukuyifihla akukhuseli ukhuseleko lwe-Defender.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: IiWindows zinokusebenzisa iPC yakho ukwabelana ngedatha yokukhuphela uHlaziyo lweWindows nezinye iiPC kwinethiwekhi yakho okanye kwi-intanethi. Ukuyekisa kugcina ukhupholo lwakho luyimfihlo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Inkonzo yeDiagTrack iqokelela kwaye ikhuphele ukusetyenziswa kweWindows kunye nedatha yokuxilonga kwiiseva zikaMicrosoft. Ukuyekisa kumisa ulayisho lwetelemetry yangasemva. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: Ilawula ukuba ingakanani idatha yoxilongo ethunyelwa yiWindows kuMicrosoft. Ubuncinci buthumela kuphela ulwazi olusisiseko lwesixhobo kunye nedatha yokuthembeka.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Ikhubaza amangeno amadala abuthathaka e-AES kwi-Windows SCHANNEL yokhuseleko umaleko. Inyanzelisa usetyenziso ukuthethathethana ngolungelelwaniso olunamandla lwe-cipher. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: Ikhusela iiWindows ekusebenziseni ngokuzenzekelayo iinkqubo kwiidrive ze-USB kunye nezinye imidiya esuswayo. Imisa iVector ye-malware eqhelekileyo.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Iqwalasela i-SCHANNEL i-hash algorithm yokuseta. Ikhubaza i-MD5 kwaye yenza i-algorithms yosapho lwe-SHA ukuze iqinisekise ingqibelelo eyomeleleyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Ivala inkqubo yokupakisha yeprotocol ye-IPv6 ngokubanzi. Iyacetyiswa ukuba inethiwekhi yakho ayisebenzisi i-IPv6 ukunciphisa uhlaselo olungeyomfuneko. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Ivala i-RC2 kunye ne-RC4 i-ciphers kwi-SCHANNEL. Ezi algorithms zophukile ngokufihlakeleyo kwaye akufunekanga zisetyenziswe kulo naluphi na uqhagamshelwano lweTLS. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: I-DCOM yiprotocol yokuvula ekude efunwa zizixhobo zolawulo lweshishini (SCCM, WMI). Ukuyikhubaza kunciphisa indawo yohlaselo kodwa kunokwaphula ukulawulwa komsebenzi okude.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Ucima ucinezelo lwe-SMB ukukhusela kwi-CVE-2020-0796. Ichaphazela kuphela uxinzelelo lwetrafikhi ye-SMB, hayi isantya sofikelelo lwefayile. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Isusa ulwazi lwe-TCP timestamp kwiipakethi zenethiwekhi. Ithintela iinkqubo ezikude ekufumaneni i-OS yakho ngokusekelwe kwixesha lokusebenza. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ezinye iindlela zokusebenza.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Ikhubaza kathathu i-DES (3DES) kwi-SCHANNEL. I-3DES isesichengeni sohlaselo lokuzalwa lwe-SWEET32 kwaye ayisathathwa njengekhuselekile. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: Isebenzisa i-Windows Disk Cleanup eyakhelwe-ngaphakathi isixhobo sokususa iifayile zexeshana, i-cache yenkqubo, kunye nenye idatha engafunekiyo ukukhulula isithuba sedisk. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Isusa umyalelo ophindaphindiweyo kuKhuseleko lweWindows ekucela ukuba ungene ngeakhawunti ye-Microsoft ukuze ufumane ukhuseleko olongezelelweyo.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Isusa unikezelo oluphindaphindiweyo kuKhuseleko lweWindows ekucela ukuba wenze isihluzo segama le-SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: Ilawula ukuba uKhuseleko lweWindows luphawula iifayile ezikhutshelweyo njengenokungakhuselekanga usebenzisa iZone.Identifier enye indlela yokuhambisa idatha.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: Isebenzisa iisetingi zoMgaqo-nkqubo weQela ukuvala i-telemetry, umncedisi wokuthenga, ingqokelela, iCopilot sidebar, kunye nezinye ezongezelelekileyo ze-Edge. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Ibonisa okanye ifihla uHlelo ngomhleli wevidiyo yeClipchamp kwimenyu yokucofa ekunene yeefayile zevidiyo.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Ibonisa okanye ifihla i Hlela ngePeyinti ukhetho kwimenu yokucofa-ekunene yeefayile zomfanekiso.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Ibonisa okanye ifihla i Hlela ngeeFoto ukhetho kwimenyu yokucofa-ekunene yeefayile zomfanekiso.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Yenza i-anti-spoofing eyomeleziweyo ye-Windows Hello ukuqondwa kobuso. Isebenza kuphela ukuba unezixhobo zebhayometriki ezihambelanayo.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: Ivumela uqhagamshelo lwe-SMB kwizabelo zomsebenzi womnatha ngaphandle kokufuna uqinisekiso. Iyadingeka ukufikelela kwizixhobo ezindala zeNAS, abashicileli, okanye iirotha. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Ibonisa iifayile ezifihliweyo eziluhlaza kunye neefayile ezicinezelweyo eziluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka kwiFayile Explorer. Yenza ezi ntlobo zefayile zichongeke ngoko nangoko.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Isantya semouse esilungelelanisa isantya sekhesa ngokusekwe kwindlela okhawuleza ngayo ukususa imawusi ngokwasemzimbeni. Khubaza kwigalelo lempuku engaguqukiyo, ekhuthazwayo kumdlalo.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Xa usetyenziso luntlitheka, iNgxelo yemposiso yeWindows ingathumela ingxelo kuMicrosoft. Ukukhubaza kumisa le datha ekuphumeni komatshini wakho.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Yenza imboniselo yesiko kwisiBono seMsitho esihluziweyo ukubonisa imicimbi yokudala inkqubo, isenza kube lula ukuphicotha ukuba zeziphi iinkqubo ezithe zasungulwa.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: IFayile Explorer ibona uhlobo lomxholo wefolda nganye kwaye isebenzise itemplate yokujonga ehambelanayo. Ukukhubaza izitshixo zonke iifolda ukuya kwimboniselo yegeneric efanayo.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Ibonisa indlela epheleleyo yesiqulathi seefayili kwibha yesihloko soMhloli weFayile endaweni yegama lesiqulathi seefayili. Iluncedo xa usebenza ngeefolda ezininzi zegama elifanayo.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Ukucofa F1 kwiFayile Explorer okanye kwidesktop ivula iWindows iwebhusayithi yoncedo kwisikhangeli sakho. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ukuqaliswa kwesi sikhangeli.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Yenza i-F8 isitshixo semenyu yelifa ekuvumela ukuba ukhethe Imo eKhuselekileyo kunye nolunye ukhetho lokuqalisa ngexesha lenkqubo yokuqalisa iWindows.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Imowudi yokuvala edibeneyo egcina imo yekernel kwidiski ukuze ii-Windows ziqale ngokukhawuleza. Inokubangela imiba ngoseto lwe-boot ezimbini okanye ukuvalwa ngokupheleleyo.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: Ilawula ukuba iWindows ikucela kangaphi ukale amava akho okanye ungenise ingxelo. Ukuseta ukuba Akusoze kumise yonke imiyalelo yengxelo.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Ibonisa incoko yababini yokuqinisekisa phambi kokucima ifayile ngokusisigxina. Yenza ukuba ufumane ukukhawuleza phambi kokuba iifayile zithunyelwe kwiRecycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: Yehlisa isithuba phakathi kwezinto kwiFayile Explorer ukuze ibonakale ixinene, ulwazi olutyebileyo lokujonga uluhlu.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Ibonisa ulwandiso lwefayile (umzekelo .txt, .exe) emva kwegama ngalinye lefayile kuMhloli. Inceda ukuchonga ukuba loluphi uhlobo lwefayile ngokukrwaqula.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Ibonisa incoko yababini yenkqubela phambili yemisebenzi yefayile (khuphela, susa, cima) ngokungagqibekanga endaweni yebar yenkqubela encinci.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: Ilawula ukuba ukhuphelo lwefayile kunye nencoko yababini eshukumayo ibonisa iinkcukacha ezipheleleyo njengesantya kunye nexesha elishiyekileyo ngokungagqibekanga.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Yenza okanye ivale iWindows Defender Firewall kuzo zonke iiprofayile zenethiwekhi. Ukukhubaza kushiya onke amazibuko angenayo engahluzwanga ngokupheleleyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Ibonisa oopopayi abamfutshane abamkelekileyo kunye nesikrini sikaHi okokuqala ungena emva kohlaziyo olukhulu lweWindows.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: Ivula ifestile nganye yesiqulathi seefayili kwinkqubo yayo. Ukuba enye iyantlitheka, ezinye zihlala zivulekile. Isebenzisa inkumbulo eyongezelelekileyo kancinane.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: Ilawula ukuba iifayile ezikwifolda yokuKhuphela zibekwe ngokwamaqela ngokomhla wohlengahlengiso. Ukucwangcisa ku Akukho kubonisa zonke iifayile kuluhlu olusicaba.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Inqaku leWindows elenza imidlalo kunye neeapps zisebenze kwimowudi yescreen esigcweleyo ukuze usebenze ngcono. Ukukhubaza kunokulungisa imiba yokuhambelana kweminye imidlalo emidala.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Ukucwangciswa kwe-GPU ekhawulezileyo kwi-Hardware kuvumela i-GPU ukuba ilawule inkumbulo yayo yevidiyo ngokuthe ngqo, oko kunokunciphisa igalelo lokulibaziseka kwimidlalo.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Ukurekhodwa okungasemva kuqhubeka kubamba umdlalo womdlalo ukuze ukwazi ukugcina imizuzu embalwa yokugqibela emva kokuba kwenzeke into ethile. Ukukhubaza kukhulula i-GPU kunye nezixhobo zedisk ukwenzela ukuguquguquka okungcono kwe-FPS.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Igcina yonke imixholo ye-RAM kwidisk kwaye inika amandla iPC ngokupheleleyo. Ifayile ye-hibernation inokusebenzisa iigigabytes ezininzi zendawo yediski.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Ibonisa iifayile kunye neefolda eziphawulwe njengezifihliweyo kwiFayile Explorer. Izinto ezifihliweyo zibonakala zicace kancinane xa zibonakala.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Amaqela aseKhaya yayiliphawu leWindows lokwabelana ngeefayile phakathi kweePC zasekhaya. Yasuswa ngaphakathi Windows 10 1803 kodwa iinkonzo ezishiyekileyo zisenokubakho.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: Ukukhuphela kunye nokungenisa ngaphandle kwefayile yomgaqo-nkqubo wokunciphisa owakhelwe kwangaphambili kwi-Windows Defender Exploit Guard, usebenzisa inkqubo yokunciphisa. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: Icwangcisa indlela yongeniso yebhodi yezitshixo esetyenziswa yiWindows. IsiNgesi sinyanzelisa uyilo lwesiNgesi nokuba zeziphi ezinye iilwimi ezifakiweyo.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: IiWindows zicinezela amaphephadonga eJPEG xa ziseta njengemvelaphi yedesktop. Ukucwangcisa kuMax kugcina umgangatho ogcweleyo womfanekiso.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Ikhonkco-Indawo yeSisombululo segama leMulticast sisombulula amagama enginginya kuthungelwano lwasekhaya. Ingasetyenziswa ekuhlaselweni kobungqina bokubamba kwaye ikhubazeke kakhulu. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Ivumela iiwebhusayithi ukuba zifunde uluhlu lwakho lolwimi lweWindows ukulungisa umxholo. Khubaza ukunqanda iiwebhusayithi ekubhaqeni useto lolwimi lwakho.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Uqinisekiso loNdwendwe lwe-SMB yivektha yentshukumo eyaziwayo esecaleni eyaye yacinywa ngokungagqibekanga ukusukela Windows 10 1709. Ukwenza kubhentsise inkqubo kunikezelo lwe-SMB olungagunyaziswanga. Vulela kuphela ukuhambelana kwesixhobo selifa.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: Inyanzelisa i-32-bit kunye ne-64-bit yezicelo ukuba zisebenzise eyona isandul' ukufakela i-.NET uguqulelo lwexesha lokusebenza endaweni yenguqulelo ezazakhelwe ngokuchasene nayo ekuqaleni.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Iqhuba inkqubo ye-Windows LSA kwimo ekhuselweyo ukunqanda ubusela beenkcukacha ngezixhobo ezifana neMimikatz. Icetyiswa kuzo zonke iinkqubo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_LocationService: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps zinokufikelela kwindawo yejografi yesixhobo sakho. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ukukhangelwa kwendawo ngazo zonke ii-apps. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: Ilawula ukuba isikrini sokutshixa seWindows siboniswa phambi kokuba isikrini sokungena sivuliwe Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: Ifaka isiphumo sobumnyama se-acrylic kwimvelaphi yesikrini sokungena. Ukukhubaza kubonisa imvelaphi ngaphandle kokwenza mfiliba.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: Ilawula ukuba isikrini sokutshixa seWindows siyaboniswa phambi kokuba isikrini sokungena sivuliwe Windows 10 (ixesha le-RS1 indlela yomgaqo-nkqubo).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Ipakethe yamava eWebhu yeWindows yongeza iwijethi kunye nomxholo oguqukayo kwisikrini sokutshixa kunye nebar yomsebenzi. Ukukhubaza kususa ezi.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: Yongeza i Khipha ukhetho kwimenyu yokucofa-ekunene yeefayile ze-.msi ze-installer, ikuvumela ukuba ukhangele imixholo yazo ngaphandle kokusebenzisa isifakeli.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Umxhasi weNethiwekhi yeMicrosoft evumela le PC ukuba ifikelele kwiifayile kunye nabashicileli ekwabelwana ngabo zezinye iikhompyuter zeWindows kwinethiwekhi. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: IiWindows zinokuvusa iPC yakho ebuthongweni ngobusuku ukuze iqhube imisebenzi yolondolozo oluzenzekelayo. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ukuvuka okungafunwayo ebusuku.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Iimephu zeWindows zinokukhuphela ngokuzenzekelayo idatha yemephu ehlaziyiweyo ngaphandle kweintanethi ngasemva. Ukukhubaza kugcina i-bandwidth ukuba awusebenzisi usetyenziso lweMaphu.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Dibana ngoku i icon kwindawo yesaziso
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Ibonisa isilumkiso xa udibanisa iincwadi ezineefayili ezinegama elifanayo. Khubaza ukubhala ngaphezulu kweefayile ngokuthe cwaka ngaphandle kokwaziswa.
TweakWhy_Microphone: I-Master toggle ilawula ukuba ingaba ii-apps zinokucela ukufikelela kumakrofoni yakho. Ukuyekisa kuthintela zonke ii-apps ekusebenziseni imakrofoni. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Ibonisa ii -apps zakho eziqaliswa rhoqo phezulu kuluhlu losetyenziso lweMenu yokuQalisa ukufikelela ngokukhawuleza.
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Isalathiso Sokuphucula Ukuchaneka kukala intshukumo ye mouse esekwe kwisantya. Ukukhubaza kunika i-1: 1 umlinganiselo wegalelo ekrwada okhethwa ngabadlali beFPS abakhuphisanayo ngenjongo engaguqukiyo.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: I-GPU yokuhlanganisa into enokuphucula ukusebenza. Ukuyekisa kungalungisa iiglitches ezibonwayo okanye ukuqhwanyaza kuqwalaselo oluthile lomboniso.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Xa ukhetha iifayile ezili-15 okanye ngaphezulu kunye nokucofa ekunene, iWindows ihlala ibonisa isilumkiso ngaphambi kokubonisa imenyu yomxholo. Oku kuphakamisa okanye kususa loo mda.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Isalathisi seSimo soQhagamshelwano lweNethiwekhi sijonga uqhagamshelo ngokucinezela iiseva zikaMicrosoft. Ukuyekisa kungabonisa ii-ayikhoni zesimo senethiwekhi ezingachanekanga. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: Hlaziya isitampu sexesha kwifayile nganye qho xa ifundwa. Ukukhubaza kunciphisa umsebenzi wokubhala kwidisk kwiinkqubo ezinokufundwa kwefayile encinci.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Isusa umda woonobumba abangama-260 kwiindlela zefayile. Ifuneka kwezinye izixhobo zophuhliso kunye nezakhiwo zeefolda ezifakwe nzulu.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Yehlisa i-buffering yenethiwekhi ukuze iipakethi zithunyelwe ngokukhawuleza. Inokuthoba i-latency kukhuphiswano lwabadlali abaninzi, kodwa inokuchaphazela uzinzo lonxibelelwano kwezinye iinethiwekhi. Khubaza ukuba ubona uqhagamshelo luyehla.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Ibonisa zonke iziqulathi zeefayili zobulali kuquka iifolda zenkqubo efihliweyo kuMhloli wokukhangela wasekhohlo.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Ibonisa icandelo lamaThala eeNcwadi (Amaxwebhu, uMculo, iMifanekiso, iiVideos) kuMhloli osekhohlo wepheyini yokukhangela.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Ipheyini yokukhangela yoMhloli iyakhula ngokuzenzekelayo kwaye iskrole ukuqaqambisa isiqulathi seefayili osijongileyo ngoku.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: I-NetBIOS yiprotocol yesisombululo esidala esisetyenziselwa ukwabelana ngefayile yeWindows. Ukukhubaza uthungelwano lwale mihla kunciphisa itrafikhi yosasazo olungeyomfuneko. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: Ilawula ukuba i-Windows ikhuphela ngokuzenzekelayo kwaye ifake abaqhubi bezixhobo zenethiwekhi ezisanda kuqhagamshelwa.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: Ivumela iWindows ukuba ibeke iiadaptha zenethiwekhi kwindawo yamandla aphantsi xa ingasebenzi. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ukulibaziseka okufutshane emva kokuba iadaptha ivukile.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Yenza le PC ifumane ezinye izixhobo kwinethiwekhi yendawo kwaye ibonakale kubo. Ifuneka kwizabelo zothungelwano lokukhangela kwiFayile Explorer. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: Ilawula ukuba iqhosha lokukhetha umsebenzi womnatha liyabonakala na kwiscreen sokutshixa phambi kokuba umsebenzisi angene.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Ukhuseleko lothungelwano lweMicrosoft Defender luvalela imidibaniso kwiindawo eziyingozi ezaziwayo kunye needilesi ze-IP kwinqanaba lenethiwekhi. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Xa uzama ukuvula uhlobo lwefayile olungadityaniswanga, Windows ibonisa incoko ebuza indlela yokuvula. Ukuyicima kucinezela lo myalezo.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Ilawula ukuba i-app entsha ye-Outlook iyafumaneka. Khubaza ukuqhubeka usebenzisa i-apps yemeyile yakudala kunye neKhalenda endaweni yoko.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Iindaba kunye nomxholo wemozulu kwibar yomsebenzi
TweakWhy_Notifications: Ukutshintshela Master kuyo yonke inkqubo yesaziso yeWindows. Ukukhubaza kumisa zonke izaziso ze-app kwaye kufihla iziko lesaziso. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Ilawula ukuba iqhosha le-Num Lock livulwa ngokuzenzekelayo xa i-Windows iqalisa. Yenza ukuba usoloko uqala ngepedi yenani esebenzayo.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: Ifaka umthengi woqhelanisa i-OneDrive kwi-desktop, okanye isusa isicelo kunye nodibaniso lwe-Explorer. Ukususa yinkqubo yokususa iphakheji, hayi iqhosha elilula — ukubuyisela kulo kunokufuna ukuqalisa ukusetelwa kwakhona, ukungena kwakhona kunye nokulinda ukubuyiselwa koqhelaniso.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: I-OneDrive ibonisa isaziso sentengiso ngaphakathi kweFayile Explorer ekukhuthaza ukuba ungqamanise iifayile. Ukufihla kususa le bhena.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: Iseta indawo engagqibekanga yoMhloli weFayile ayivulayo xa iqaliswa kwibar yomsebenzi okanye kwiMenu yokuQala.
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Inika amandla i-Defender ukuba ibone kwaye ibeke kwikwarantini ii-apps ezinokungafuneki ezifana ne-adware, bundleware, kunye nabathumbi bebrawuza. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ezinye iindlela zokusebenza.
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Isebenzisa isethi yenkqubo yelifa kunye nolungelelwaniso lomiselo lwesiqalo ukuphucula ukuphendula kwesixokelelwano ngokubanzi. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Imisela isicwangciso samandla se-Windows. Balanced ilungelelanisa ukusebenza ngokusekelwe kumthwalo. High Performance igcina i-CPU kwisantya esiphezulu. Ultimate Performance isusa lonke ukunqanda ukonga amandla ukuze kufezekiswe ukuhamba okuphezulu. Ultimate Performance inokuba ayifumaneki kuzo zonke iinkqubo.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: Igcina yonke imiyalelo eqhutywa ziimodyuli zePowerShell kwilog yomsitho weWindows. Iluncedo kuphicotho lokhuseleko kunye nokuphanda ngeziganeko.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: Igcina umxholo ogcweleyo kuyo yonke ibhloko yeskripthi ye-PowerShell ephunyezwa kwilog yomnyhadala weWindows. Unceda kuphando lwasemva kwesiganeko.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: I-PowerShell 7 ithumela idatha yosetyenziso olungachazwanga kuMicrosoft ngokuzenzekelayo. Iyayekisa ukuphuma kule telemetry. Idityaniswe kuFakelo/Hlaziya i-PowerShell 7 ukhetho.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: Imisa iMicrosoft Edge ekubeni iphinde iphinde ithathe indlela emfutshane yedesktop emva kohlaziyo. Isebenza kuzo zonke iitshaneli zokukhupha i-Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Ibonisa okanye ifihla ukhetho Loshicilelo kwimenyu yomxholo yonqakrazo-ekunene ye .bat kunye .cmd iifayile ezishicilelweyo.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Icima iClickOnce intembeko yayo yonke imimandla yokhuseleko. Inqanda usetyenziso olungathembekanga lweClickOnce ekunikezeni ukufakela. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Ikhubaza 8.3 ukuveliswa kwegama lefayile emfutshane kwi-NTFS. Iphucula ukusebenza kwenkqubo yefayile kwaye isusa uphawu oluhambelanayo lwelifa olungafane lufuneke namhlanje.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Ithintela iimacros, ukwenziwa komxholo wangaphandle, kunye noseto lwentembeko ye-Outlook kuzo zonke iinguqulelo zeOfisi. Yehlisa iivektha zohlaselo ezisekwe kuxwebhu. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: Ithintela i-Word ekuzihlaziyeni ngokuzenzekelayo amakhonkco angaphandle kumaxwebhu kunye ne-imeyile. Yehlisa umngcipheko wokukhutshwa kwedatha ngokusebenzisa amakhonkco amaxwebhu agxininisiweyo. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: Isebenzisa iseti ebanzi yobhaliso lwamaxabiso aqinayo aquka ukhuseleko lwesiqinisekiso, i-UAC, i-NTLM, i-TCP/IP, kunye nokuziphatha kokususa ikhadi elihlakaniphile. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Ikhubaza i-RPC-over-TCP yoMcwangcisi woMsebenzi kunye noMphathi woLawulo lweNkonzo ekude. Yehlisa ukuvezwa kwiindlela zohlaselo lolawulo olukude. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Ikhubaza itrafikhi yeWinRM engafihlwanga kunye noqinisekiso lokugaya, emva koko iqalise kwakhona inkonzo yeWinRM. Iqinisekisa ukuba unxibelelwano lolawulo olukude luhlala lufihliwe. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: Yenza iqhosha lePrinta leSkrini livule isiXhobo sokuSnipha ukuze ubambe isikrini esisebenzisanayo endaweni yokukhuphela ngokuthe cwaka kwibhodi eqhotyoshwayo.
TweakWhy_QoS: Umgangatho woMcwangcisi wepakethe yeNkonzo unokubeka phambili iintlobo ezithile zetrafikhi yenethiwekhi. Kuyafuneka ukuba ezinye iimpawu zeQoS zenethiwekhi zisebenze ngokuchanekileyo.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: Icandelo loFikelelo oluKhawulezayo kwi-Explorer lingabonisa iifolda ezityelelwa rhoqo. Fihla ukugcina uFikelelo oluKhawulezayo ubonisa kuphela iifolda zakho eziphiniweyo.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: Icandelo loFikelelo oluKhawulezayo kwi-Explorer lingabonisa iifayile ezisanda kuvulwa. Fihla ukugcina uFikelelo oluKhawulezayo ubonisa kuphela iifolda zakho eziphiniweyo.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: Iibhloko ezishicilelweyo zesifakeli seRazer Synapse ekusebenzeni ngokuzenzekelayo. Ikhusela isoftware yeRazer engafunwayo ekubeni ifakwe ngasemva. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Ilawula ukuba ngaba ii-Windows zilandela umkhondo kwiifayile ezisandul' ukufikelelwa ukuze ziboniswe kuFikelelo oluKhawulezayo kwaye uvule iibhokisi. Khubaza ukumisa oku kulandelwa.
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Ibonisa kutshanje kunye neefolda ezifikelelwe rhoqo njengeendlela ezimfutshane kwicandelo loFikelelo oluKhawulezayo loMhloli.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Ibonisa uluhlu losetyenziso olusanda kufakwa kwi-Start Menu. Khubaza ukugcina i-Start Menu app isicoci soluhlu.
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Ilawula ukuba ngaba iiWindows ziqhuba ngokuzenzekelayo izilungisi xa zibhaqwa. Ukuhlala kukho kusacela imvume yakho phambi kokuba usebenze.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Ibonisa isiqinisekiso sokuqinisekisa phambi kokuhambisa iifayile kwiRecycle Bin. Yenza ukunqanda ukucinywa ngempazamo.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Yenza ukuba ugcino oluzenzekelayo lwamaxesha athile lweefayile zobhaliso lweWindows kwifolda yeRegBack ngaphakathi kulawulo lweWindows.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: Lungisa ukusilela koqhagamshelo lomxhasi kunye nomxhasi-kwicala loqhagamshelo ngolungelelwaniso lwe-RPC, i-SMB, iNqaku kunye noShicilelo, i-spooler, i-TCP, kunye nezicwangciso zokufunyanwa kwenethiwekhi. Olu tshintsho luthwala umngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lufuna ukuqaliswa kwakhona.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: Ukulungisa umcimbi owaziwayo kwezinye Windows 11 yakha apho ufikelelo lwesabelo se-SMB lusilele emva kohlaziyo ngenxa yexabiso lobhaliso elilahlekileyo.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: IiWindows zigcina iigigabytes ezininzi zediski yendawo yohlaziyo, iifayile zexeshana, kunye neecache. Ukukhubaza ibango kwakhona le ndawo ebekelwe emva kohlaziyo olulandelayo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: Ivumela iWindows ukuba icwangcise ukuqalisa kwakhona kwakamsinyane emva kokugqiba ufakelo lohlaziyo.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Ibonisa isaziso kwibar yomsebenzi xa uHlaziyo lweWindows lufakiwe kwaye lufuna ukuqaliswa ngokutsha ukuze lugqibe.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: Iphinda ivule nasiphi na isiqulathi seefayili zeefestile ebezivuliwe xa ugqibezela ukuloga. Ibuyisela umxholo wakho osebenzayo kwigama ngalinye.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: Ibuyisela iMenu yokuQalisa kuyilo lwangaphambili lwe-24H2 Windows 11 24H2 yakha. Inokuchaphazela ukuhambelana nohlaziyo lweWindows oluzayo. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: I-S3 bubuthongo obunzulu bendabuko apho iPC inika amandla ngokupheleleyo amacandelo. Ezinye iisistim azigqibekanga kwiLindi langoku elinokukhupha amandla ngelixa lingasebenzi.
TweakWhy_SMB1: I-SMBv1 yiprotocol yokwabelana ngefayile ephelelwe lixesha kwaye esengozini eyaziwa ngokuba yi-EternalBlue exploits. Khubaza ngaphandle kokuba kufunwa izixhobo zenethiwekhi ezindala kakhulu. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Yenza icandelo leseva yefayile ye-SMB evumela ezinye iikhompyutha kumsebenzi wothungelwano ukuba zifikelele kwiifolda ekwabelwana ngazo kunye nabashicileli kule PC. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: IiWindows zinokugcina usetyenziso oluvulekileyo xa uphuma kwaye uzivule ngokuzenzekelayo emva kokungena kwakho okulandelayo.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Xa ukhuphela ifayile kwi-intanethi, iWindows iyayiphawula ngesiphawuli sezowuni. Ukugcina oku kuvuliwe kuvumela izilumkiso zokhuseleko xa usebenzisa iifayile ezikhutshelweyo.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Imisebenzi emininzi ecwangcisiweyo iqhuba ngasemva ukuqokelela kunye nokulayisha idatha yokuxilonga. Ukukhubaza kumisa le misebenzi ekusebenzeni ngokuzenzekelayo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Xa uvula ifayile enolwandiso olungaziwayo, iWindows inokucebisa ukuba ujonge kwiMicrosoft Store. Ukukhubaza kutsiba eli cebiso.
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: Yongeza iibhokisi zokukhangela ecaleni kweefayile kunye neefolda kwi-Explorer ukuze kube lula ukukhetha okuninzi ngaphandle kokufuna ukubamba iCtrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: Ilawula ukufikelela kwiisensa zezixhobo ezifana ne-accelerometer, i-gyroscope kunye nesensa yokukhanya okujikelezileyo. Ibalulekile kakhulu kwiithebhulethi nakwizixhobo eziguqukayo.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: Iseta ukhetho lweenkonzo zeWindows ezingabalulekanga ukusuka kwi-Automatic ukuya kwi-Manual startup. Iinkonzo zisazakuqala xa zifuneka. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: Qwalasela uMphathi weSeshini ulungelelwaniso lokukhangela lwe-DLL ukunqanda usetyenziso ekulayisheni ii-DLL kwiindawo ezingathembekanga. Ivala indlela yokuhanjiswa kwe-malware eqhelekileyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: Isebenzisa imigaqo eyongezelelweyo yokuhlaselwa kwe-Exploit Guard yokunciphisa umphezulu ngokusebenzisa i-Windows Defender ukuvala iindlela eziqhelekileyo ze-malware. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: Yongeza ibhlokhi ye-firewall ephumayo kwiibhinari ze-Windows ezakhelwe ngaphakathi ezidla ngokusetyenziswa kakubi yi-malware (LOLBins) ukufowunela ekhaya okanye ukukhuphela umthwalo. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: Ikhuphela ngaphezulu iXesha leWindows ukusebenzisa ipool.ntp.org endaweni yeseva yexesha leWindows.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: Lugcina uqwalaselo lwesabelo sakho esikhoyo se-SMB kunye nenkcazi egciniweyo yothungelwano xa ezinye iitweaks zothungelwano zisetyenziswa. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Inika amandla ukuloga koqhagamshelo oluwisiweyo noluvunyelweyo kwifayile yelog yeWindows Firewall ukuze ukwazi ukuphicotha umsebenzi wenethiwekhi.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Usetyenziso lweSetingi lungabonisa iingcebiso ezixhaswayo kunye neengcebiso ecaleni kwesetingi zakho. Ukufihla kususa lo mxholo wokuthengisa.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: Yongeza inketho yokwabelana kwimenyu yokucofa-ekunene yeefayile, ikuvumela ukuba wabelane ngazo nge-apps okanye ngokwabelana ngeWindows kufutshane.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: Ivumela iWindows ukuba yabelane ngezinto ezenziwayo phakathi kwezixhobo zakho ngeakhawunti yeMicrosoft. Ukukhubaza kugcina umsebenzi wendawo kulo matshini kuphela.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: Ivumela iidrive zenethiwekhi ezimaphulwe ukuba zibonakale kulawulo oluphezulu (lomlawuli) iinkqubo kunye nomsebenzisi ongeneyo wangoku. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Yenza iwizadi eyenziwe lula yokwabelana ngefayile xa ucofa-ekunene ifayile okanye incwadi eneenkcukacha kwaye ukhethe ukwabelana ngayo.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Ibonisa okanye ifihla i-ayikhoni yotolo oluncinane kwiifayile ezimfutshane ukubonisa ukuba ziindlela ezimfutshane hayi ezona fayile.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: Ilawula ukuba iWindows iyafakela - Indlela emfutshane kwigama leendlela ezimfutshane ezenziwe kwidesktop.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: Ilawula ukuba ukucinywa kunye namaqhosha okuqalisa kwakhona ayabonakala kwi-Windows yokutshixa isikrini.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Isebenzisa iinkcukacha zakho zokungena ukugqiba ngokuzenzekelayo ukuseta iprofayile yakho emva kohlaziyo lweWindows. Khubaza ubumfihlo obungakumbi.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: Ilawula ukuba ukhetho lokuLala luyavela kwiMenu yokuQala nokuba iqhosha lokulala liyasebenza na.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Ilawula xa isiboniso sicinywa naxa iPC ingena kwimo yokulala emva kokungasebenzi. Khubaza ukuthintela ukulala okuzenzekelayo.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: Xa ucofa ifestile kwicala elinye, iWindows icebisa ezinye iifestile ezivulekileyo ukuba zigcwalise indawo eseleyo. Khubaza ukufota ngaphandle kweengcebiso.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Ukulinda kwale mihla (S0) kunokubangela i-CPU ephezulu kunye nokusetyenziswa kwamandla ngelixa iPC ibonakala ilele. Olu lungiso lutshintshela kwisitayile se-S3 sokuziphatha okunzulu kokulala.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: UMicrosoft unokubonisa izaziso ezinxulumene neakhawunti kunye nemiyalelo kwi-Start Menu. Ukufihla kususa ezi.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: Ilawula umlinganiselo wobeko lwe Windows 11 Qala iMenu phakathi kwe-apps ephiniweyo kunye nomxholo ocetyiswayo.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Imenyu yokuQala ingabonisa iingcebiso malunga neempawu zeWindows kunye nezindululo zosetyenziso olutsha. Ukufihla kususa ezi ngcebiso.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Ibonisa okanye ifihla icandelo eliCetyisiweyo emazantsi eMenu yokuQalisa. Kwiintlelo zoShishino nezeMfundo oku kunokufihlwa ngomgaqo-nkqubo.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: Idlala i-chime yokuqalisa iWindows xa idesktop ilayisha emva kokuba ungene.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Ukucofa uShift amaxesha amahlanu ngokukhawuleza kubangela incoko yababini yokufikeleleka kwamaqhosha aSticky. Khubaza ukunqanda oku ekuphazamiseni umsebenzi wakho.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Ikhulula ngokuzenzekelayo isithuba sedisk kwishedyuli ngokucima iifayile zexeshana, ukhuphelo oludala, kunye nemixholo yeRecycle Bin.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Ibonisa iifayile zeWindows ezikhuselweyo kwiFayile Explorer. Ezi zifihlwe ngokungagqibekanga ukuthintela ukuguqulwa okanye ukucima ngempazamo.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: I-SysMain ilayisha kwangaphambili ii -apps ezisetyenziswa rhoqo kwi-RAM ukukhawulezisa amaxesha okuqaliswa. Kwii-SSD ibonelela ngenzuzo encinci kwaye idla ngokukhubazeka ngokukhuselekileyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Ifihla i-UI yokhetho lwenethiwekhi kwi-Windows yokutshixa isikrini. Ithintela ukutshintsha iisetingi zenethiwekhi phambi kokuba ungene. Olu tshintsho luthwele umngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: I-OneDrive kunye nabanye ababoneleli bongqamaniso banokubonisa izaziso zentengiso ngaphakathi kwi-Explorer. Khubaza ukufihla ezi bhanela.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: Isebenzisa idatha yakho yoxilongo ukubonisa iingcebiso ezenzelwe wena, iintengiso, kunye neengcebiso ezivela kuMicrosoft. Ukuyekisa ukuphuma.
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: Ivula uMphathi woMsebenzi ngokuthe ngqo kwiNgcaciso isithuba ebonisa zonke iinkqubo endaweni yemboniselo yesishwankathelo esenziwe lula.
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Indlela amaqhosha ebar yomsebenzi adityaniswa ngayo
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Yongeza uMsebenzi wesiphelo kwimenyu yemenu yebar yomsebenzi
TweakWhy_Teredo: I-Teredo yiprothokholi yokuthungela ebonelela ngoqhagamshelo lwe-IPv6 ngaphezulu kweenethiwekhi ze-IPv4. Kufuneka kuqhagamshelo lwe-Xbox Live kunye nezinye izicelo zoontanga-kunye. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Ibonisa okanye ifihla i-icon yePC kwidesktop yakho yokufikelela ngokukhawuleza kwiidrive kunye nezixhobo.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: IiWindows zigcina umboniso we thumbnail kwifayile efihlakeleyo yesiseko sedata ukukhawulezisa ukukhangela incwadi. Ukukhubaza kunqanda le cache ekubeni igcinwe kwidiski.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Ibonisa umfanekiso kunye nomboniso wevidiyo njengee-thumbnails kuMhloli endaweni yee-ayikhoni zohlobo lwefayile eqhelekileyo. Ukukhubaza kubonisa ii-icon kuphela.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: I-Windows yenza iifayile ezifihliweyo zeThumbs.db kwizabelo zomsebenzi womnatha ukugcina i-thumbnails efihlakeleyo. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ezi fayile ekubeni zenziwe kwiindawo zenethiwekhi.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Imibala yeebar zewonga yefestile ukuze itshatise umbala wakho we-Windows we-accent endaweni yokubonisa kumhlophe qwa okanye ngwevu.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Ibonisa zonke ii-iyikhoni zendawo yesaziso kwitreyi yenkqubo endaweni yokufihla ii-iyikhoni eziphuphumayo emva kotolo olwandisiweyo.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokufikelela kwigama leakhawunti yakho, umfanekiso, kunye nolunye ulwazi lweakhawunti.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: Ivula incoko yababini yokukhetha ukususa okanye ukubuyisela usetyenziso olukhethiweyo lweWindows Store. Okunye ukususwa kuyindlela enye, kwaye neendlela zokubuyisela ezixhaswayo zisenokufuna iSitolo seMicrosoft, i-winget, okanye ukuphinda kufakwe ngesandla ukulandelelwa. Lo ngumsebenzi wepakethe esemngciphekweni omkhulu kunokutshintsha ngokulula.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP ziyakwazi ukufunda nokubhala kwidatha yekhalenda yakho.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP ziyakwazi ukufunda imbali yakho yomnxeba.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokufikelela kuluhlu lwabafowunelwa bakho.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokuqokelela ulwazi lokuxilonga malunga nesixhobo sakho kunye nobume baso.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: Ilawula ukuba usetyenziso lwe-UWP lunokufunda kwaye luthumele i-imeyile egameni lakho.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: Ilawula ukuba usetyenziso lwe-UWP lunokufikelela kwiifayile naphi na kwinkqubo yakho yefayile ngaphaya kweefolda zazo zosetyenziso. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP ziyakwazi ukufunda nokuthumela imiyalezo ebhaliweyo.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokuthumela izaziso kwiziko lesaziso le-Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokufikelela kwezinye izixhobo ezidityanisiweyo ezingabandakanywanga ziindidi ezithile.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zingenza kwaye zilawule iifowuni.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: Ilawula ukuba usetyenziso lwe-UWP luyakwazi ukulawula iBluetooth kunye nezinye izixhobo zerediyo ezingenazingcingo.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Ifayile yokutshintshiselana ye-UWP (swapfile.sys) isetyenziswa zii-apps ze-Windows zoGcino kwimemori ye-paging yenyani. Ukukhubaza kukhulula isithuba sedisk ukuba awusebenzisi usetyenziso loGcino. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokufikelela kumsebenzi wakho kunye noluhlu lwezinto oza kuzenza.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: Ilawula ukuba ii-apps ze-UWP zinokuvulwa kusetyenziswa imiyalelo yelizwi ngasemva.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: Iseta iprofayile yothungelwano engagqibekanga esetyenziswa kuqhagamshelwano olutsha okanye olungaqondwayo lwenethiwekhi xa lubhaqwa okokuqala. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: Isebenzisa iseti yomgaqo-nkqubo wokhuseleko lwe-Adobe Reader DC kuquka indlela ekhuselweyo, imbono ekhuselweyo, kunye nokukhubaza ilifu kunye newebhu. Olu lutshintsho olunomngcipheko ophezulu onokuba nzima okanye akunakwenzeka ukuwubuyisela umva.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: Ilawula ukuba uHlaziyo lweWindows lukhuphela ngokuzenzekelayo uhlaziyo ngasemva. Ukukhubaza kukuvumela ukuba ukhethe ixesha lokukhuphela uhlaziyo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: Iseta ezikhethwayo SCHANNEL cipher suites ukuya eyomeleleyo AES-256 kunye AES-128 ezahlukeneyo. Iqinisekisa uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo oluluqilima kulo lonke uqhagamshelwano lweTLS. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Isusa i icon encinci yolwazi evela kwidesktop xa iWindows Spotlight wallpapers isebenza.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: Izinyanzelo .NET Framework 4.x kunye ne-2.x ukusebenzisa inkqubo-ehlala ikho ye-TLS kunye ne-cryptography eyomeleleyo. Inqanda usetyenziso oludala lwe-NET ekubeni lubuyele kwii-ciphers ezibuthathaka. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: Ilawula ukuba uHlaziyo lweWindows lukhuphela ngokuzenzekela kwaye lufakele abaqhubi behardware. Ukukhubaza kukuvumela ukuba ulawule abaqhubi ngesandla. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: Yandisa ubungakanani boshicilelo lwesiganeko soKhuseleko lweWindows ukuya kwi-1 MB. Inceda ukugcina imicimbi yophicotho oluninzi phambi kokuba amangenelo amadala abhalwe ngaphezulu.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Yenza i-Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, kunye ne-PKCS ii-algorithms zotshintshiselwano ezingundoqo kwi-SCHANNEL. Iqinisekisa utshintshiselwano oluphambili olukhuselekileyo luyafumaneka kuqhagamshelo lweTLS. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: Xa yenziwe yasebenza, uHlaziyo lweWindows lukwajonga uhlaziyo kwezinye iimveliso zikaMicrosoft ezifana neOfisi. Ikhubaza imida yohlaziyo kwi-Windows kuphela.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: Ilawula ukuba uHlaziyo lweWindows lubonelela ngeSixhobo sokuSuswa kweSixhobo esinobungozi. Ukukhubaza kuyinqanda ekutyhalweni ngoHlaziyo lweWindows. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Xa yenziwe yasebenza, uHlaziyo lweWindows lukwajonga kwaye lufakele uhlaziyo lwenye isoftware kaMicrosoft efakiweyo ecaleni kohlaziyo lweWindows.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: I-PowerShell 7 liqokobhe leqonga leqonga langoku elinokuphuculwa kokusebenza kunye neempawu ngaphezulu kweWindows PowerShell 5.1 eyakhelweyo. Idityaniswe kwi-PS7 Telemetry toggle.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: I-TLS 1.0 kunye ne-1.1 ziyekisiwe ngenxa yobuthathaka obaziwayo. Ukuzikhubaza kwenza lukhuni inkqubo ngokuchasene ne-BEAST, POODLE, kunye nohlaselo oluhambelanayo. Ukunika amandla kwakhona kufuneka kwenziwe kuphela ukuhambelana kwelifa.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: Yenza naziphi na iindlela zobhaliso ezilahlekileyo ezifunwa zezinye i-tweaks ezinzima ngaphambi kokuba ziqhube. Eli linyathelo elifunekayo elingenasiphumo esibonakalayo somsebenzisi.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: Ikhusela iWindows ekubeni iqalise ngokuzenzekelayo emva kokufaka uhlaziyo ngaphandle kwegalelo lakho. Ikunika ulawulo xa ukuqaliswa ngokutsha kwenzeka.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Ibonisa okanye ifihla iJonga losetyenziso kuGcino lukaMicrosoft oluvela kwiVula ngencoko yababini kwiintlobo zeefayile ezingadityaniswanga.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Ibonisa imiyalezo yesimo esineenkcukacha ngexesha lokuqalisa kunye nokuvalwa kweWindows endaweni yesipinari sokulayisha.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: Ilawula ulungiselelo lweziphumo ezibonwayo ngokubanzi. Umsebenzi uvala oopopayi ukuze uzive ukhawuleza. Imbonakalo yenza zonke iziphumo.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Inkonzo yemiyalezo yeWAP Push ifumana imiyalezo esemoyeni evela kubathuthi abahambahambayo. Ayifane ifuneke kwiPC engaqhagamshelwanga kwinethiwekhi yeselula.
TweakWhy_WPBT: I-WPBT yitafile ye-firmware evumela abavelisi ukuba baqhube isoftware ngexesha lokuqalisa kweWindows. Ukukhubaza kunqanda izinto eziphunyeziweyo ezitofelwe ngumenzi ekusebenzeni ngokuzenzekelayo. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Ingqamanisa uluhlu lolwimi olukhethayo kwiseva yeMicrosoft ukuze umxholo wewebhu ungqinelane nezinto ozikhethayo. Khubaza ubumfihlo obungakumbi.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: Idibanisa iziphumo zewebhu ze-Bing kwibar yokukhangela yeWindows. Ukukhubaza kwenza ukhangelo lwesixokelelwano lubonise iifayile zasekuhlaleni kunye nezicwangciso kuphela.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Ibonisa iibhena kunye nokukhuthaza ukugqamisa iifitsha ezintsha zeWindows emva kohlaziyo. Khubaza ukucinezela ezi zaziso.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: I-WiFi Sense inokwabelana ngokuzenzekelayo ngephasiwedi yakho ye-WiFi kunye nabafowunelwa bakho. Ukukhubaza kuthintela le ndlela yokuziphatha yokwabelana.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Isusa umda wendlela yefayile enamagama angama-260 kwizicelo zeWin32. Ifuneka kwezinye izixhobo zophuhliso kunye nezakhiwo zeefolda ezinzima.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: Ivula incoko yababini yeefitsha ozikhethelayo ukongeza okanye ukususa ubunakho beWindows obufana neepakethi zolwimi okanye izixhobo ze-RSAT. Ukubuyisela kwakhona kunokufuna ufikelelo kuHlaziyo lweWindows, iifayile zemvelaphi, okanye ukuqalisa kwakhona ukulandelelwa, ke oku kufuneka kuthathwe njengolawulo lwepakethe endaweni yokuguqula ngokulula.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Icwangcisa ukuba iqokobhe le-Windows (ibar yomsebenzi, i-Start Menu, iziko lentshukumo) isebenzisa imo yoMnyama okanye yoKhanya.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: Ivula i Vula okanye uvale iifitsha ze-Windows kwincoko yababini ukuze uvule okanye uvale iikhomponenti ozikhethelayo zeWindows njengeHyper-V okanye iTelnet. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Oku kulawula iseti ye-Windows Imowudi yomdlalo eyakhelwe ngaphakathi, hayi umsebenzi weprofayile yeGaming yeBaseline. Windows Imowudi yomdlalo ibeka phambili iinkqubo zemidlalo kwaye icinezela umsebenzi ongemva. Abanye abasebenzisi bayayicima ukuze bazinze xa besasaza okanye berekhoda, kuba utshintsho lobubekho bungabangela ukuwa kwe-encoder.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: Ibhalisa le PC ukuba ifumane uhlaziyo lweWindows kamsinya nje yakuba ikhutshiwe endaweni yokulinda ukukhutshwa kancinci kancinci. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: Ivumela iWindows ukuseta ngokuzenzekelayo umshicileli osanda kusetyenziswa njengowendalo. Ukukhubaza kugcina umshicileli okhethiweyo ngesandla elungisiwe.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Umatshini wenyani okhaphukhaphu ozimeleyo wokuqhuba ngokukhuselekileyo usetyenziso olungathembekanga ngaphandle kokubeka umngcipheko inkqubo yakho engundoqo. Ifuna iWindows Pro okanye ngaphezulu.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: Ilawula ukuba iWindows ingakwazi .vbs kunye neefayile ezishicilelweyo ze.js. Ukukhubaza kuthintela ezi ntlobo zombhalo ekuphumezeni xa ucofa kabini. Olu tshintsho lunomngcipheko ophakathi kwaye lunokuchaphazela ukuqhutywa komsebenzi othile.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: IiWindows zibonisa iingcebiso ezizivelelayo kunye neengcebiso ngelixa usebenza. Ukuyekisa ukuvala ezi ziphazamiso.
TweakWhy_WindowsWelcomeExperience: Ibonisa iphepha elamkelekileyo lesikrini esigcweleyo emva kohlaziyo olukhulu lweWindows olubonisa izinto ezintsha. Khubaza ukutsiba esi sikrini.
TweakWhy_XboxGameBar: I-Xbox yoMdlalo weBar yi-in-game overlay (Win+G) yescreenshots, ukurekhodwa kwevidiyo, kunye nokubekwa kweliso kwenkqubo yokusebenza.
